headline: Shares of construction materials and engineering-related companies are trading higher after Iran signaled that the Strait of Hormuz will remain open for the duration of the ceasefire, easing concerns inflation risk and spurring expectations for monetary easing.
summary: Shares of construction materials and engineering-related companies are trading higher after Iran signaled that the Strait of Hormuz will remain open for the duration of the ceasefire, easing concerns inflation risk and spurring expectations for monetary easing.
